name: BioAdaptives, Inc.
summary: BioAdaptives, Inc. operates as a research, development, and educational company. The company focuses on offering health and wellness products, such as dietary supplements and specialty food items for humans and animals. It offers PrimiCell, PrimiLungs, and PluriPain or humans; and Canine Regen and Equine Regen for dogs and horses. The company was formerly known as APEX 8 Inc. and changed its name to BioAdaptives, Inc. in September 2013. BioAdaptives, Inc. was incorporated in 2013 and is based in Las Vegas, Nevada.
